description: Machine-readable representation of UK Skilled Worker Visa eligibility criteria

root.description: UK Skilled Worker Visa Eligibility Assessment

has_approved_employer.question: Does the applicant have a job offer from a UK employer approved by the Home Office?
has_approved_employer.help_text: Approved employers are on the register of licensed sponsors

has_certificate_of_sponsorship.question: Does the applicant have a Certificate of Sponsorship (CoS) from their employer?
has_certificate_of_sponsorship.help_text: The CoS is an electronic record with a reference number, valid for 3 months

check_occupation_eligibility.question: Is the job eligible for Skilled Worker visa?
check_occupation_eligibility.help_text: Job must have a 4-digit SOC 2020 occupation code and be on the eligible occupations list

check_salary_list_or_shortage.question: Is the job on the Immigration Salary List OR Temporary Shortage List?
check_salary_list_or_shortage.help_text: Medium skilled jobs can only apply if on one of these lists

determine_salary_threshold.description: Determine which salary rules apply based on job type
determine_salary_threshold.routing_logic: If occupation is in healthcare/education list, go to healthcare_education_salary, else go to standard

check_healthcare_education_salary.question: Does the salary meet healthcare/education requirements?
check_healthcare_education_salary.help_text: Salary must be at least £25,000 AND meet the national pay scale going rate for the specific job

criteria.going_rate_source: National pay scales (NHS bands or education pay scales)

check_care_worker_registration.question: If applicant is a care worker (6135) or senior care worker (6136) in England, is employer registered with Care Quality Commission?
check_care_worker_registration.help_text: Only applies to care workers in England

check_standard_salary_requirement.question: Does the salary meet the standard requirements?
check_standard_salary_requirement.help_text: Salary must be at least £41,700 per year OR the going rate for the job, whichever is HIGHER

check_reduced_salary_eligibility.question: Is the applicant eligible for reduced salary requirements?
check_reduced_salary_eligibility.help_text: Multiple paths can qualify for paying between 70-90% of going rate. If ANY path is satisfied, applicant proceeds to English language check.
check_reduced_salary_eligibility.evaluation_logic: Check each path in any order. If applicant meets criteria for ANY path, outcome is 'eligible_via_any_path'. If NONE are met, outcome is 'not_eligible'.

paths.description: Job is on the Immigration Salary List
criteria: Job occupation code is on the Immigration Salary List
Salary is at least £33,400 per year
Salary meets the standard going rate for the job

paths.description: Under 26, recent graduate, or in professional training
criteria: Salary is at least £33,400 per year
Salary is at least 70% of the standard going rate for the job

AND one of: Under 26 on application date, OR currently on/recently on Student visa (bachelor's or above), OR currently on/recently on Graduate visa, OR working towards UK regulated profession qualification, OR working towards full registration/chartered status in sponsored job
paths.time_limit: Maximum 4 years total stay including Graduate visa

criteria: Salary is at least £33,400 per year
Salary is at least 80% of the standard going rate for the job
Has UK PhD or equivalent overseas doctorate in STEM field (verified by Ecctis if overseas)
PhD is relevant to the job being sponsored for
Job is on the list of occupations that qualify for PhD salary discount
Salary is at least £37,500 per year
Salary is at least 90% of the standard going rate for the job
Has UK PhD or equivalent overseas doctorate in non-STEM field (verified by Ecctis if overseas)
PhD is relevant to the job being sponsored for
Job is on the list of occupations that qualify for PhD salary discount

paths.description: Postdoctoral position in science or higher education
criteria: Salary is at least £33,400 per year (calculated at 70% of going rate)
Salary is at least 70% of the standard going rate for the job
Job is a postdoctoral position

occupation_descriptions.2119: Natural and social science professionals not elsewhere classified

paths.time_limit: Maximum 4 years total stay including Graduate visa

check_english_language.question: Does the applicant meet English language requirements?
check_english_language.help_text: Must prove English to at least B2 CEFR level unless exempt

paths.requirement: Passed English language assessment accepted by regulated professional body

paths.description: Previously proved English in successful visa application
paths.requirement: Proved English knowledge in previous UK visa application

qualifications: Scottish Higher or Advanced Higher in English

paths.description: Degree from UK institution taught in English
paths.requirement: Degree-level qualification taught in English, awarded by UK institution

paths.description: Degree from overseas institution taught in English
paths.requirement: Degree taught in English, verified as equivalent to UK bachelor's or higher by Ecctis
Pass SELT from approved provider at B2 level or above

check_financial_requirement.question: Does the applicant meet financial requirements?

criteria.recency_requirement: Day 28 must be within 31 days of application
exemptions: Been in UK with valid visa for at least 12 months
Employer confirms they can cover costs (via 'sponsor certifies maintenance' on CoS)

ELIGIBLE.description: Applicant meets all criteria for Skilled Worker visa
next_steps: Apply online within 3 months of Certificate of Sponsorship date
Pay application fee (£769-£1,751 depending on circumstances)
Prove identity and attend appointment if required

INELIGIBLE_no_approved_employer.reason: No job offer from Home Office approved employer
INELIGIBLE_no_approved_employer.guidance: Employer must apply for sponsor licence if not already approved

INELIGIBLE_no_cos.reason: No Certificate of Sponsorship from employer
INELIGIBLE_no_cos.guidance: Employer must provide CoS after checking eligibility

INELIGIBLE_occupation_not_eligible.reason: Job occupation code not eligible for Skilled Worker visa
INELIGIBLE_occupation_not_eligible.guidance: Check if eligible for another UK work visa type

INELIGIBLE_medium_skilled_not_on_list.reason: Medium skilled job not on Immigration Salary List or Temporary Shortage List
INELIGIBLE_medium_skilled_not_on_list.guidance: Medium skilled jobs must be on one of these lists to qualify

INELIGIBLE_salary_too_low.reason: Salary does not meet minimum requirements for this visa
INELIGIBLE_salary_too_low.guidance: Check if eligible for reduced salary requirements or another visa type

INELIGIBLE_cqc_not_registered.reason: Employer not registered with Care Quality Commission (required for care workers in England)
INELIGIBLE_cqc_not_registered.guidance: Employer must be CQC registered for occupation codes 6135 and 6136 in England

INELIGIBLE_english_language.reason: Does not meet English language requirements
INELIGIBLE_english_language.guidance: Must prove English to B2 CEFR level or meet exemption criteria

INELIGIBLE_insufficient_funds.reason: Insufficient funds to support self in UK
INELIGIBLE_insufficient_funds.guidance: Must have £1,270 for 28 days or employer must certify maintenance

salary_calculation.rule: Salary must meet the HIGHER of: (1) threshold minimum, (2) going rate for occupation, (3) percentage of going rate if using reduced route
salary_calculation.going_rate_source: Government published tables by occupation code

special_cases.healthcare_education: Use national pay scales (NHS bands or education pay scales)
special_cases.extending_visa: Different thresholds may apply - see extend visa guidance
special_cases.updating_visa: Different thresholds may apply - see update visa guidance

minimum_wage.rule: Job must pay at least national minimum wage and follow UK working hours rules

time_limits.under_26_graduate_postdoc: Maximum 4 years total stay including any Graduate visa time
time_limits.general: Visa can be extended repeatedly if requirements still met
time_limits.settlement: Can apply for indefinite leave to remain after 5 years
